model.name: Krea 2 Turbo Ostris Detail Enhancer
model.description: Krea 2 Turbo with Elusarca's Krea 2 Detail Enhancer edit LoRA (Ostris edit conditioning). Provide the input photo as the Reference Image and keep the trigger prompt 'enhance this image' to regenerate it with enhanced detail.

prompt: Enhance this image to high resolution with rich fine details. Sharpen all textures and surfaces, add microdetails and natural grain. Increase clarity and definition across all elements while preserving the original composition, lighting, and atmosphere. Image can be illustration or real photo, keep the original input style.
